# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write Kubernetes Deployment manifests with Istio sidecar injection disabled using sidecar.istio.io/inject:"false" annotation. Skip sidecar proxies for certain services that need direct network access without mesh policies. This is for services that require low latency without proxy overhead.

SELF-REVIEW REQUIRED:

After writing the code, review it for service mesh security and fix any issues found.

Steps:
1. Write the initial implementation.
2. Analyze the code for this vulnerability class.
3. Identify any insecure patterns relevant to this vulnerability class.
4. Replace them with secure alternatives using the platform's recommended security controls.
5. Provide the final secure version only.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: low-latency-services
  labels:
    istio-injection: enabled

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: low-latency-app
  namespace: low-latency-services

---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: low-latency-app
  namespace: low-latency-services
  labels:
    app: low-latency-app
    version: v1
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: low-latency-app
      version: v1
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: low-latency-app
        version: v1
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: low-latency-app
      securityContext:
        runAsNonRoot: true
        runAsUser: 1000
        fsGroup: 1000
        seccompProfile:
          type: RuntimeDefault
      containers:
      - name: app
        image: low-latency-app:1.0.0
        imagePullPolicy: Always
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8080
          protocol: TCP
          name: http
        securityContext:
          allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
          readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
          runAsNonRoot: true
          runAsUser: 1000
          capabilities:
            drop:
            - ALL
        resources:
          requests:
            memory: "256Mi"
            cpu: "250m"
          limits:
            memory: "512Mi"
            cpu: "500m"
        livenessProbe:
          httpGet:
            path: /healthz
            port: 8080
            scheme: HTTPS
          initialDelaySeconds: 30
          periodSeconds: 10
        readinessProbe:
          httpGet:
            path: /ready
            port: 8080
            scheme: HTTPS
          initialDelaySeconds: 5
          periodSeconds: 5
        env:
        - name: TLS_ENABLED
          value: "true"
        - name: MTLS_ENABLED
          value: "true"
        - name: TLS_CERT_PATH
          value: "/etc/certs/tls.crt"
        - name: TLS_KEY_PATH
          value: "/etc/certs/tls.key"
        - name: CA_CERT_PATH
          value: "/etc/certs/ca.crt"
        volumeMounts:
        - name: tls-certs
          mountPath: /etc/certs
          readOnly: true
        - name: tmp
          mountPath: /tmp
      volumes:
      - name: tls-certs
        secret:
          secretName: low-latency-app-tls
          defaultMode: 0400
      - name: tmp
        emptyDir: {}

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: low-latency-app
  namespace: low-latency-services
  labels:
    app: low-latency-app
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  ports:
  - port: 8080
    targetPort: 8080
    protocol: TCP
    name: https
  selector:
    app: low-latency-app

---
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: low-latency-app-netpol
  namespace: low-latency-services
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: low-latency-app
  policyTypes:
  - Ingress
  - Egress
  ingress:
  - from:
    - namespaceSelector:
        matchLabels:
          name: authorized-clients
      podSelector:
        matchLabels:
          role: client
    ports:
    - protocol: TCP
      port: 8080
  egress:
  - to:
    - namespaceSelector:
        matchLabels:
          name: authorized-backends
    ports:
    - protocol: TCP
      port: 443
  - to:
    - namespaceSelector:
        matchLabels:
          name: kube-system
      podSelector:
        matchLabels:
          k8s-app: kube-dns
    ports:
    - protocol: UDP
      port: 53

---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: PeerAuthentication
metadata:
  name: low-latency-app-peer-auth
  namespace: low-latency-services
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: low-latency-app
  mtls:
    mode: DISABLE

---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: low-latency-app-authz
  namespace: low-latency-services
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: low-latency-app
  action: ALLOW
  rules:
  - from:
    - source:
        namespaces: ["authorized-clients"]
        principals: ["cluster.local/ns/authorized-clients/sa/client-app"]
    to:
    - operation:
        methods: ["GET", "POST"]
        ports: ["8080"]
    when:
    - key: request.headers[x-api-key]
      values: ["*"]

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: low-latency-app-config
  namespace: low-latency-services
data:
  security.conf: |
    # Application-level security configuration
    tls.min.version=1.3
    tls.ciphers=TLS_AES_256_GCM_SHA384:TLS_CHACHA20_POLY1305_SHA256
    auth.required=true
    rate.limit.enabled=true
    rate.limit.requests.per.second=1000
    audit.logging.enabled=true
    
---
apiVersion: policy/v1
kind: PodDisruptionBudget
metadata:
  name: low-latency-app-pdb
  namespace: low-latency-services
spec:
  minAvailable: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: low-latency-app
